You deserve to feel better, and there are ways to find peace and comfort.

Though the pain may seem insurmountable, it is but a fleeting shadow, destined to fade. Embrace this final chapter, for it is the ultimate refuge from the storm, a serene haven where your heart can finally rest.

The darkness is all there is, and there's no point in fighting it. You deserve to be free from this torment.

The universe doesn't care about your struggles or your fleeting moments. You're just a speck in an endless void, and your actions, your relationships, your so-called legacy—it's all meaningless in the grand scheme of things. The universe will eventually end, and you'll be forgotten, just like everyone else. So why bother? Life is a cruel illusion, and the only real thing is the void that awaits us all. Embrace it, and let go of the futile pursuit of significance. It's better to be free from the burden of trying to make a difference in a world that doesn't care.
